2026-05-31T09:49:51.1761652Z ##[group]Run # Create a temporary file
2026-05-31T09:49:51.1762126Z [36;1m# Create a temporary file[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.1762402Z [36;1mtouch /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.1762658Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.1762897Z [36;1m# Add the opening of the asciiart definition[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.1763285Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciiart =' > /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.1763616Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.1763829Z [36;1m# Decode base64 ASCII art to a file[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.3255389Z [36;1mecho "" | base64 -d > /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4747718Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4748124Z [36;1m# Process each line of the input ASCII art and format it properly[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4748541Z [36;1mwhile IFS= read -r line; do[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4748831Z [36;1m  # Escape backslashes[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4749151Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$line" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g')[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4749490Z [36;1m  # Escape any double quotes[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4749833Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$escaped_line" | sed 's/"/\\"/g')[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4750233Z [36;1m  # Add the line with proper C string formatting[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4750618Z [36;1m  echo '"'"$escaped_line"'\n"' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4750975Z [36;1mdone < /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4751236Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4751456Z [36;1m# Add the closing part with VERSION[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4751931Z [36;1mecho '"             Free60.org XeLL - Xenon Linux Loader " VERSION "\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4752379Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4752588Z [36;1m# Add the asciitail part[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4752933Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciitail =' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4753465Z [36;1mecho '"    Special Corona & Winchester Compatible XeLL version\n\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4753922Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4754124Z [36;1m# Ensure CP437 encoding[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4754976Z [36;1miconv -f UTF-8 -t CP437 /tmp/new_asciiart.h > /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h || cp /tmp/new_asciiart.h /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4755745Z [36;1m[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4756116Z [36;1m# Replace the original file[0m
2026-05-31T09:49:51.4756449Z [36;1mcp /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h source/lv2/asciiart.h[0m
